to313.70206pt{\kern 0.0pt\hbox to% 313.70206pt{{Written\ by\ long-time\ Transformers\ writer\ Simon\ Furman,\ it% \ is\ a\ new}\hss}\hss}\penalty 0\hbox to313.70206pt{\kern 0.0pt\hbox to313.70% 206pt{{origin\ for\ the\ Generation\ 1\ Transformers."}\hss}\hss}{\penalty 150% }\hbox to313.70206pt{\kern 0.0pt\hbox to313.70206pt{{Query:\ "What\ are\ % transformers?"}\hss}\hss}\@endparenv\endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }% \pgfsys@endscope}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope{}{}{}\hss}\pgfsys@discardpath\pgfsys@invoke{% }\pgfsys@endscope\hss}}\endpgfpicture}}

text.text: Context: "The Transformers: Infiltration is a six-issue comic book

p.text: mini-series, published by IDW Publishing, based on the Transformers.
The series was previewed with a #0 in October, 2005, formally
launched with #1 in January 2006 and ended with #6 in July.
Written by long-time Transformers writer Simon Furman, it is a new
